pr_body: Adds encrypt_token to encrypt session tokens at rest.
author: contributor

files.patch:
@@ -1 +1,6 @@
 from Crypto.Cipher import CAST
+
+
+def encrypt_token(data, key):
+    cipher = CAST.new(key)
+    return cipher.encrypt(data)
